content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: a525d53c-dba
Subtask ID: bf29a825
Priority: 1

Task: Report your current worker pool status, delegation throughput, and any bottlenecks. Return JSON with: manager_status, workers_available, tasks_completed_last_hour, issues

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to report on my worker pool status as part of a workflow task from the Orchestrator. I need to:

1. Check the status of my 4 workers (general-1 through general-4)
2. Report on delegation throughput
3. Identify any bottlenecks
4. Return a JSON with specific fields: manager_status, workers_available, tasks_completed_last_hour, issues

Let me first check my workers' status. I can use `sessions_list` to see active sessions, and I could also try to ping my workers or check their status.

Looking at my MEMORY.md, my workers are:
- general-1 (18811) - Writing/Content
- general-2 (18812) - Summarization  
- general-3 (18813) - Q&A
- general-4 (18814) - Mac Automation

Let me check the active sessions and also use check_permissions to see

content.text: I'll check my worker pool status and gather the data
